questionHtml: Write down the equation of the perpendicular bisector of BC.
markschemeHtml:
y=0.5x-1          A1A1

 

Note: Award A1 for 0.5x and A1 for -1 (or equivalent equation). Award at most A1A0 if answer is not presented as an equation.

[2 marks]
